name: Nutty Coconut Bread (Machine) - Regular Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Yeast, fast rise or machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water and yeast to the bowl of a standing mixer.
2. Mix on low speed until smooth.
3. Gradually add the flour and salt, mixing on medium speed.
4. Stir in the butter, cream of coconut, pecans, and walnuts.
5. Transfer dough to a lightly greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
6. Cover and let rise at room temperature for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Bake the bread for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped.
9. Remove from the pan onto a wire rack to cool.
Source: Electric Bread
This softly subtle bread has a wonderful, chewy texture. The coconut, pecans, and walnuts make a harmonious trio in morning toast. Or serve this bread freshly-baked as an accompaniment to your favorite fruit salad.
